wg_add_world.description: Add world and assign a channel

options.kanal: Channel where this world's reports will be posted

options.lista: Player nicknames, separated by commas or new lines

wg_add_absent.description: Add single absence to a member

wg_delete_absent.description: Delete single absence for a member

wg_clear_all.description: Clearing every absence report (this server only)

test_scrapera.description: Test the bot's connection to SFDataHub

setup.description: Run the one-time server configuration wizard (admin only).

setup_reset.description: Unlock configuration so /setup can be run again (admin only).

wg_set_ranking.description: Configure or disable the automatic weekly absence ranking for one world

options.enabled: Turn the automatic weekly ranking on or off for this world
options.weekday: Day of the week to post it (only used if enabled)

wg_ranking_status.description: Show the current automatic ranking schedule

options.swiat: Show only this world's schedule (omit to list every world)

settings.description: Change a single server setting without resetting everything (admin only).

sf_events_setup.description: Set the channel where official game event webhooks arrive (admin only).

options.channel: The channel that receives official game news/event webhooks

sf_events_toggle.description: Enable or disable the SF events tracking module (admin only).

options.state: True to enable, False to disable

events.description: Show current and upcoming in-game events for this weekend.
